introSection: Crazy 8 Family Coaster is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in July 2025.

On July 28, 2025, Quassy Amusement Park announced that the ride would have its grand opening on August 16.

fullText:
Crazy 8 Family Coaster is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA.

The ride opened in July 2025.

On July 28, 2025, Quassy Amusement Park announced that the ride would have its grand opening on August 16.
